/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgstmvfacetracker.so -o ../../gst-plugins/libgstmvfacetracker.so CMakeFiles/gstmvfacetracker.dir/gstmvfacetracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gstmvfacetracker.dir/tracklet_meta.cpp.o   -L/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so ../../tracking/libmergenvision_tracking.a -lnvds_meta -lnvdsgst_meta -lnvds_utils
